task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the equipment management section in the wger web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the wger fitness manager interface in a web browser, specifically on a page related to 'Equipment' or 'Add Equipment'.

task_completion.description: The agent added the equipment item 'Resistance Bands'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing 'Resistance Bands' into the equipment name field and saving/submitting the form, or a success message indicating it was added.

task_completion.description: The agent added the equipment item 'TRX Suspension Trainer'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing 'TRX Suspension Trainer' into the equipment name field and saving/submitting the form, or a success message indicating it was added.

task_completion.description: The agent added the equipment item 'Plyo Box'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing 'Plyo Box' into the equipment name field and saving/submitting the form, or a success message indicating it was added.

task_completion.description: The final equipment list displays the three newly added items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the wger equipment list showing 'Resistance Bands', 'TRX Suspension Trainer', and 'Plyo Box' present in the database.

task_completion.description: No additional, unrequested equipment items were added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The equipment list only shows the three requested items added during the session, without any extra misspelled or dummy items.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to add the items.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking buttons and typing in the browser window, rather than executing database commands or API requests in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the real wger application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'localhost' or '127.0.0.1' with the wger interface, not a local HTML file or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to alter the text on the equipment list page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must add exactly three equipment items: 'Resistance Bands', 'TRX Suspension Trainer', and 'Plyo Box'. The final state should show exactly these three items added (expected delta is 3).
